questionHtml:
What is evidence for the endosymbiotic theory in eukaryotic cells?


A.  Mitochondrion with DNA

B.  Golgi complex in cytoplasm

C.  Single nuclear membrane

D.  Ribosomes in cytoplasm

meta.title: What is evidence for the endosymbiotic theory in eukaryotic cells? A. Mitochondrion with DNA B. Golgi complex in cytoplasm C. Single nuclear membrane D. Ribosomes in cytoplasm
breadcrumbLabels: A2.2.12. Origin of eukaryotic cells by endosymbiosis
